case_title: FUKUI, SATOMI (AKA MACKAY, SATOMI) VS BRANDNER, MICHAEL

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FUKUI, SATOMI (AKA MACKAY, SATOMI) RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRANDNER, MICHAEL $3,245.00 PRINCIPAL, $3,226.04 INTEREST, $15.40 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $6,486.44, RENEWAL OF JUDGEEMENT ON CASE NO. 747169.
